# A Major

A Major is a software company for the agent era, based in Singapore and serving clients worldwide. It operates two distinct arms: Agency and Products.

## Agency

> Software that just works. Experts you can talk to.

Websites, apps, and enterprise systems, with AI agents at the core. A Major Agency handles the build so founders and businesses can focus on the business. Built for humans, by humans.

- [Agency](https://amajor.ai/agency): Full overview, services, team, and booking

### What the Agency builds

- Web apps (React, Next.js, full-stack)
- Mobile apps (React Native, Swift, Kotlin, Flutter)
- SaaS products (multi-tenant, billing, auth)
- Enterprise systems (ERP, CRM, internal tooling)
- E-commerce platforms
- Browser extensions
- UI/UX design and design systems
- DevOps and cloud infrastructure
- MCP servers and AI agent integration
- Performance optimisation
- MVP scoping and startup builds
- Digital transformation and legacy modernisation
- Engineering consultancy and fractional CTO

### Agency Pages

- [Services](https://amajor.ai/services): Full catalog of development services
- [Web Design](https://amajor.ai/services/web-design): Custom websites, mobile-first, Core Web Vitals optimised
- [Web Apps](https://amajor.ai/services/web-apps): Full-stack React/Next.js applications
- [Mobile Apps](https://amajor.ai/services/mobile-apps): React Native, Swift, Kotlin, Flutter
- [SaaS Products](https://amajor.ai/services/saas-products): Multi-tenant SaaS with billing and auth
- [Enterprise Systems](https://amajor.ai/services/enterprise-systems): ERP, CRM, internal tooling at scale
- [API Development](https://amajor.ai/services/api-development): REST, GraphQL, tRPC, MCP servers
- [DevOps](https://amajor.ai/services/devops): CI/CD, Docker, Kubernetes, cloud deployments
- [Consultancy](https://amajor.ai/services/consultancy): Fractional CTO, architecture reviews, technical advisory
- [MVP Scoping](https://amajor.ai/services/mvp-scoping): Product discovery, technical architecture, roadmap
- [Digital Transformation](https://amajor.ai/services/digital-transformation): Modernise operations with software
- [Legacy Modernisation](https://amajor.ai/services/legacy-modernisation): Migrate and refactor legacy systems

---

## Products

> Most AI agents didn't deliver. We build the ones that do.

Industry research puts real enterprise value from AI agents under 10%. A Major Products builds the platform that makes delivering real value repeatable — agent-native software, not retrofitted AI wrappers.

- [Products](https://amajor.ai/products): Full products overview

### Ryu

Ryu is end-to-end managed infrastructure for AI agents. The engines (OpenClaw, Hermes, ZeroClaw, Claude Code) already exist — Ryu is the entire car built around them: security, model routing, memory, tools, workflows, and deployment, all sourced, assembled, and managed.

- [Ryu](https://amajor.ai/products/ryu): Product detail page
- [ryuhq.com](https://ryuhq.com): Ryu homepage

---
